subcodes.title: Public address given on 1913-04-03
subcodes.first_line: I came from a distant land. I have travelled twenty thousand miles until I came to you in Stuttgart.... In this age every face must turn to God!
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @oneness; unity of religion, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha
